content.speakerText: Can I renew my book twice?
expectedAnswers: No, only once — unless someone else has reserved it.
You're allowed one renewal only. If someone else wants it, you can't renew again.
Sorry, only one renewal is permitted. After that, you need to return it.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确否定二次续借并说明例外情况
语言准确性：正确使用'only one renewal'和条件结构
表达自然度：语气礼貌，符合图书馆工作人员的沟通风格

content.scenarioHint: 用户在图书馆借书前，想确认书籍的借阅期限以及逾期会有什么后果
expectedAnswers: How long can I keep this book?
What's the loan period for this book?
If I return it late, will I be charged a fine?
Can you tell me the due date and what happens if I'm late?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了借阅期限和逾期后果
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无严重错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常提问习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'loan period', 'due date', 'fine', 'late' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 用户打算借书，但不确定能否按时归还，想提前了解是否可以续借以及续借条件
expectedAnswers: Can I renew this book if I need more time?
Is renewal allowed, and what are the conditions?
What happens if I want to keep the book longer? Can I extend it?
Are there any restrictions on renewing this book?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰询问了续借可能性及条件
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的条件句和疑问结构
表达自然度：符合真实图书馆场景中的口语表达
关键词覆盖：使用了 'renew', 'extend', 'conditions', 'restrictions' 等场景关键词
